description:
Extract above-fold CSS and inline it in HTML head. Load remaining CSS asynchronously via preload. Configure font-display: swap and preload critical fonts.

**Rationale:** Eliminates render-blocking stylesheets and FOIT/CLS, significantly improving FCP and reducing layout shift.
title: Critical CSS inlining and render-blocking elimination
